work_experience_normalized.description: Responsible for the sourcing process of pre-series parts from development until final assembly in prototypes and concept cars.

Implementation of project management basics by optimizing development processes for the new Seat Ibiza. Participated in various seminars on automotive industry, project management, teamwork, VW strategy 2018, and lean manufacturing.
Translation project of the enterprise website from Danish to Spanish.

international_experience_normalized.institution_or_company: Universität Siegen, Department of Hydrology Engineering
international_experience_normalized.description: Analysis of the suitability of existing dams for energy storage. Published in Water Resources Management.

soft_skills: Leadership and coordination of a small subcontracted team for a given project
